## ALN checklist

- [ ] The change preserves ALN v0.1 as a notation, not a runtime, permission system, or safety system.
- [ ] Any new or changed loop has a clear goal, context, authority, verifier, stop rules, and return artifacts.
- [ ] Authority boundaries are explicit and do not imply permission to deploy, delete, spend money, contact third parties, or expose private data.
- [ ] Attribution is included for adapted examples, prompts, articles, videos, repos, or workflows.
- [ ] The change is small enough for focused review.
